subcodes.first_line: ...There is but one reality and one essence that is expounded in the worlds of outer form, and, at each of its stages, is described by a specific name ... in accordance with the degrees of its particular manifestations on the plane of this limited world
subcodes.subjects: @alchemy; the elixir, @unity of existence [wahdatu'l-wujud], @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria)
